objective.description_en: (Optional) Locate and obtain the Bogatyr squad patch in Lighthouse

objective.description_en: Locate the traces of the traitors
objective.description_ja: 裏切り者の痕跡を特定する

objective.description_en: Wait for Lightkeeper to prepare the documents on The Unheard
objective.description_ko: 등대지기가 The Unheard에 관한 문서를 준비할 때까지 기다리세요.
objective.description_ja: LightkeeperがThe Unheardに関する文書を準備するのを待つ

objective.description_en: Find a lead on Item 1156 (Pick 1)
objective.description_ja: Item 1156に関する手がかりを見つける （1択）
